evals.prompt: I'm auditing a Node.js API before first production deploy. It's currently at Phase 3 (Performance). The Lighthouse score is 85, but LCP is 3.2s (exceeds 2.5s target). Is this READY or CONDITIONAL?
evals.expected_output: Should say: 'CONDITIONAL. Performance isn't blocked (Phase 3 failure doesn't block shipping per Severity Rules), but document the finding. Investigate why LCP is 3.2s (slow API, large bundle, unoptimized queries). Make it a known risk acceptance or schedule optimization post-launch.'

evals.prompt: During Phase 2 (Security) audit, I notice JWT tokens in the URL params. Is this an automatic NOT READY?
evals.expected_output: Should say: 'YES. Phase 2 Security finding: sensitive data in URLs. This is blocking per Severity Rules (any Phase 2 FAIL = NOT READY). Fix: remove JWT from URL, use Authorization header instead. Re-audit Phase 2 before deploying.'
